pi_items.source: task.json description (line 4) and setup_task.sh (line 54) which creates course with shortname 'BIO101'

task.json description (line 4) mentions 'Emily Patel (epatel)' and setup_task.sh (line 61) ensures user 'epatel' exists

privileged_info_summary: The task configures quiz overrides in a Moodle environment for course BIO101. It creates a user override for student epatel on the quiz 'Midterm Exam: Cell Biology' with 90-minute time limit (5400 seconds) and 2 attempts allowed. A group override is created for 'Extended Time Group' with 75-minute time limit (4500 seconds) and 2 attempts allowed. All metadata values are correctly aligned with the task description and verified by the verifier.py script. The data is synthetic and generated by the setup_task.sh script.
